expertAssessments.rationale: Desktop click/focus/highlight and mobile no-overflow behavior were verified through Playwright MCP on production.
GitLab tag pipeline v8.12.68 succeeded and production /api/version reports the expected commit/tag.
The tested UX keeps alert context on the dashboard instead of forcing route navigation, with visible focus and severity highlight.
